s2.ptxt: Inspection procedure when applying voltage between the terminals:

s3.ptxt: Disconnect the connector from the intake air control valve.
Apply battery voltage between terminals 1 (-) and 2 (+) of the intake air control valve. Check that a clicking sound is heard from the intake air control valve.
If the result is not as specified, replace the intake air surge tank.

s2.ptxt: Apply 26.6 kPa (200 mmHg, 7.9 in. Hg) of vacuum to the actuator. Check if the valve rotates open, as shown in the illustration.
Apply vacuum for 1 minute. The actuator should continue to keep the valve open.
If the result is not as specified, replace the air cleaner assembly.
